name: Currant Cakes (Old-fashioned Christmas Drop Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the currants with some of the flour.
2. Work the butter and sugar together until smooth, then slowly incorporate each egg one at a time.
3. Add lemon zest, juice, salt, and more flour gradually.
4. Incorporate the remaining flour and currants slowly.
5. Drop spoonfuls onto large buttered pans, pressing flat with a knife to ensure thin cakes.
6. Preheat the pan slightly; this allows the cakes to melt more before baking in the oven.
7. Ensure pans are thoroughly buttered to prevent cakes from sticking during removal.
(recipe didn't include baking time or temperature).
